items.q: How do you say 'I get up' in Spanish?
items.correct: Me levanto - the reflexive pronoun is needed because you raise yourself.
items.why: Daily-routine verbs like levantarse, ducharse and acostarse are reflexive; without the pronoun, 'levanto' means you lift something else.

items.q: How do you say it is one o'clock?
items.correct: 'Es la una' - one o'clock takes the singular verb and article.
items.misconception: 'Son las una', using the plural as for all other hours.
items.why: Students memorise 'son las...' as a fixed formula and over-apply it; only one o'clock is singular because 'una' is one hour.

items.q: What is the correct yo-form of 'almorzar' (to have lunch)?
items.correct: Almuerzo - the o changes to ue in the stem.
items.misconception: Almorzo, keeping the spelling of the infinitive.
items.why: Stem-changing verbs alter their vowel in stressed forms; forgetting the o-to-ue change is one of the most common conjugation errors at GCSE.

items.q: What does 'me levanto a las siete' mean?
items.misconception: I go to bed at seven
items.why: The answer examiners want is: I get up at seven. “I go to bed at seven” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.

items.q: 'Son las siete y cuarto' tells you the time is what?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: 7:15. “7:30” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.

items.q: Which is the correct first-person form of 'acostarse'?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Me acuesto. “Me acosto” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
Correct answer: To set the table. “To clear the snow” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.

items.q: 'Las dos y media' is how many minutes past two o'clock?
items.why: The real figure is 30 minutes. The wrong options cluster deliberately close — anchor the exact number to one concrete fact so it can't drift.
